user_request: Emergency rite: Rhino APC ignition requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: Rhino APC ignition requires operation

### TOPIC
Rhino APC ignition

### COMPONENT
Rhino APC ignition

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Rhino APC ignition
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant benediction upon this Rhino APC ignition as we commence sacred operation.
First: Anoint the Rhino APC ignition with consecrated oils, whispering the Litany of Commencement thrice.
Second: Perform the Rhino APC ignition diagnostica, verifying all machine-spirits remain in harmonious alignment during operation.
Third: Engage the starter coils whilst intoning the Prayer of the Awakened Engine, that the machine's heart may beat true.

sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- ground-to-orbit link
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, stabilize the ground-to-orbit link in this hour of critical operation.
First: Calibrate the ground-to-orbit link's targeting cogitators with the Ritual of Celestial Alignment.
Second: Perform blessed purification upon the ground-to-orbit link's transmission arrays, banishing electromagnetic interference through operation.
Third: Invoke the Machine Spirits of the heavens, that the ground-to-orbit link may sing with unbroken clarity.

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us purity of essence as we undertake material purity testing upon this sacred substance.
First: Examine the material purity with spectroscopic devotion, recording all deviations from the prescribed standard during testing.
Second: Apply the material purity verification protocols, ensuring no profane contaminants corrupt our work through rigorous testing.
Third: Consecrate the material purity through thermal purification, that its essence may be rendered wholly acceptable to the Machine.

### PRAYER
prayer:
By the Machine Spirits' eternal vigilance, sanctify this data-slate for its sacred activation.
First: Purify the data-slate through ceremonial ablation, removing all corrupted code and profane data preceding activation.
Second: Inscribe the data-slate with protective sigils and blessing-scripts, preparing it for activation through divine benediction.
Third: Invoke the data-slate's dormant machine-spirit, commanding it to awaken and fulfill its destined activation.

user_request: My fracture is failing during welding — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### TOPIC
fracture welding

### COMPONENT
fracture

### OPERATION
welding

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fracture
- welding

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, mend the fracture through blessed welding, that the broken may become whole once more.
First: Prepare the fracture surfaces through careful grinding and purification, removing all corrupted material before welding commences.
Second: Apply the fracture-healing ritual, positioning the broken edges in perfect alignment whilst heating with plasma torch during welding.
Third: Fuse the fracture through sacred welding, invoking the machine-spirits to bind metal to metal with unbreakable bonds.

user_request: Prayer for treatment of the corrosion
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### TOPIC
corrosion treatment

### COMPONENT
corrosion

### OPERATION
treatment

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- corrosion
- treatment

### PRAYER
prayer:
By the Machine Spirits' eternal mercy, grant us the power to purge the corrosion and restore lost glory.
First: Identify all manifestations of corrosion through blessed inspection, mapping the disease's extent upon the sacred metal during treatment.
Second: Apply corrosion-banishing compounds through ritualistic scrubbing, removing the profane oxidation through methodical treatment of all affected surfaces.
Third: Seal the corrosion wounds with protective oils and blessed coatings, that the machine may be forever defended against this creeping corruption.
